  $( function() {		
		$('a[href^="tabs-"]').on('click', function(e) {
			e.preventDefault();
		});		
		
    var level = "admin1";
    
    function load_correct_map(){
       if (level=='admin1'){
        admin1_map.load();
      }
      
      if (level=='admin2'){
        admin2_map.load();
      }

      if (level=='all'){
        all_map.load();
      }          
    }  

    function update_level(){
      var overwrite_level = location.hash.replace('#', '')
      if (overwrite_level){level = overwrite_level};    
    }

    $("#tabs").tabs({
       beforeActivate: function(event, ui) {
					var hash = ui.newTab.children("li a").attr("href");  
					if(history.pushState){history.pushState(null, null, hash);}
          else {location.hash = hash;}          
       }
    });
    
    <!-- when a tab is clicked -->
    $("#tabs").on('tabsactivate', function () { 
      update_level();
      load_correct_map();
    }); 
    
   $(window).load(function(){
   
      update_level();
      load_correct_map();
    })
		

  });
  </script>
